title: Why was Jack Doherty arrested? Viral handcuff video sparks heated debate across social media
summary_full: A viral video showing streamer Jack Doherty in handcuffs and being escorted to a police car has sparked widespread debate online. While some viewers were shocked, many social media users questioned the footage's authenticity, calling it a staged stunt. The controversy comes weeks after Doherty claimed he had been placed under house arrest, adding more uncertainty to the situation and fueling speculation across the internet.
